languages.text: Аугментация, сконцентрированная лишь на элите корабля, подняла эффективность экипажа корабля на невероятный уровень. Сплавленные с кораблем вокс-офицеры передавали информацию мгновенно, канониры и пушкари стали деталями в самонаводящихся орудиях, и все это вместе превратило флагман династии фон Валанциус в непобедимое пустотное чудовище, легенды о котором рассказывали на протяжении столетий.

Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.
languages.original_text: Аугментация, сконцентрированная лишь на элите корабля, подняла эффективность экипажа корабля на невероятный уровень. Сплавленные с кораблем вокс-офицеры передавали информацию мгновенно, канониры и пушкари стали деталями в самонаводящихся орудиях, и все это вместе превратило флагман династии фон Валанциус в непобедимое пустотное чудовище, легенды о котором рассказывали на протяжении столетий.

traits.locale_text: Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

languages.text: 強化は艦の精鋭のみが受けたもので、乗組員の能力を信じられないほど高めた。ヴォックスの士官たちは艦と融合し、瞬時に情報を伝達することができた。砲手や砲術士たちは自走砲の部品となり、共にヴォン・ヴァランシウス旗艦を無敵の伝説の空母とした。その名は数世紀にわたって語り継がれることとなる。
languages.original_text: Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

traits.locale_text: 強化は艦の精鋭のみが受けたもので、乗組員の能力を信じられないほど高めた。ヴォックスの士官たちは艦と融合し、瞬時に情報を伝達することができた。砲手や砲術士たちは自走砲の部品となり、共にヴォン・ヴァランシウス旗艦を無敵の伝説の空母とした。その名は数世紀にわたって語り継がれることとなる。

languages.text: 舰船上精英专享的植入物改造，将船员的效能提升到了不可思议的水平。与舰船融为一体的音阵官员能瞬间传递信息，炮手和火炮军官则成为自导火炮的部件。这一切让冯·瓦兰修斯的旗舰坚不可摧，成为虚空中的传奇巨兽，在此后数个世纪仍被人传颂。
languages.original_text: Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

traits.locale_text: 舰船上精英专享的植入物改造，将船员的效能提升到了不可思议的水平。与舰船融为一体的音阵官员能瞬间传递信息，炮手和火炮军官则成为自导火炮的部件。这一切让冯·瓦兰修斯的旗舰坚不可摧，成为虚空中的传奇巨兽，在此后数个世纪仍被人传颂。

languages.text: Les augmentations, bien que réservées à l'élite du vaisseau, permirent à l'équipage d'atteindre un niveau incroyable de performance. Les officiers vox furent fusionnés avec le vaisseau afin de pouvoir transmettre des informations instantanément, tandis que les officiers d'artillerie devinrent des composants vivants de canons autoguidés. Toutes ces modifications transformèrent le vaisseau amiral de la maison von Valancius en une légendaire et invincible créature du vide qui ferait parler d'elle des siècles durant.
languages.original_text: Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

traits.locale_text: Les augmentations, bien que réservées à l'élite du vaisseau, permirent à l'équipage d'atteindre un niveau incroyable de performance. Les officiers vox furent fusionnés avec le vaisseau afin de pouvoir transmettre des informations instantanément, tandis que les officiers d'artillerie devinrent des composants vivants de canons autoguidés. Toutes ces modifications transformèrent le vaisseau amiral de la maison von Valancius en une légendaire et invincible créature du vide qui ferait parler d'elle des siècles durant.

languages.text: Los aumentos, reservados únicamente para la élite de la nave, elevaron el rendimiento de la tripulación a niveles increíbles. Los oficiales de vocos que se habían fundido con la nave podían transmitir la información al instante, mientras que los artilleros y oficiales de artillería se convirtieron en componentes funcionales de los cañones automáticos. En conjunto, hicieron invencible a la nave insignia von Valancius: una bestia legendaria del vacío de la que se hablaría durante siglos.
languages.original_text: Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

traits.locale_text: Los aumentos, reservados únicamente para la élite de la nave, elevaron el rendimiento de la tripulación a niveles increíbles. Los oficiales de vocos que se habían fundido con la nave podían transmitir la información al instante, mientras que los artilleros y oficiales de artillería se convirtieron en componentes funcionales de los cañones automáticos. En conjunto, hicieron invencible a la nave insignia von Valancius: una bestia legendaria del vacío de la que se hablaría durante siglos.

languages.text: Yalnızca geminin seçkinlerine ayrılan ogmentasyonlar, mürettebatın performansını inanılmaz bir seviyeye çıkardı. Gemiyle birleşmiş voks subayları bilgiyi anında iletebilirken topçular ve topçu subayları, kendi kendini güdüleyen topların çalışan bileşenleri hâline geldi. Bu durum, von Valancius sancak gemisini yenilmez, yüzyıllar sonra bile dilden dile dolaşacak efsanevi bir uçsuz canavarı yaptı.
languages.original_text: Augmentation, reserved only for the ship's elite, raised the crew's performance to an incredible level. Vox officers who had been fused with the ship were able to transmit information instantly, while gunners and artillery officers became working components in self-guided cannons. Together, this made the von Valancius flagship invincible, a legendary beast of the void that would be spoken of for centuries afterward.

traits.locale_text: Yalnızca geminin seçkinlerine ayrılan ogmentasyonlar, mürettebatın performansını inanılmaz bir seviyeye çıkardı. Gemiyle birleşmiş voks subayları bilgiyi anında iletebilirken topçular ve topçu subayları, kendi kendini güdüleyen topların çalışan bileşenleri hâline geldi. Bu durum, von Valancius sancak gemisini yenilmez, yüzyıllar sonra bile dilden dile dolaşacak efsanevi bir uçsuz canavarı yaptı.

languages.text: Den Eliten des Schiffes vorbehaltene Augmentationen hoben die Leistung der Besatzung auf ein unglaubliches Niveau. Mit dem Schiff verbundene Vox-Offiziere waren in der Lage, umgehend Daten zu übertragen, während Kanoniere und Artillerieoffiziere zu Komponenten autonomer Geschütze wurden. Dadurch wurde das Flaggschiff derer von Valancius unbesiegbar und zu einer legendären Bestie der Leere, über die man auch Jahrhunderte später noch sprechen würde.

Dadurch wurde das Flaggschiff derer von Valancius unbesiegbar und zu einer legendären Bestie der Leere, über die man auch Jahrhunderte später noch sprechen würde.
